docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NECFCU
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NECFCU AS TO DEFENDANT BAYASGALAN, GANTUMUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED AUG-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYASGALAN, GANTUMUR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NECFCU REPRESENTED BY LILLY LO, MANAGER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NECFCU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYASGALAN, GANTUMUR $4,975.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 INTEREST, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00, $4975.00 IN PRINCIPAL PLUS $25.00 PREJUDGMENT INTEREST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
